Domain anchor: shock absorber. buffer eventually fills or drains. Domain anchor: shock absorber. Causal chain: disturbance arrives -> buffer absorbs -> visible output is delayed -> capacity changes -> effect emerges later. Consequence signature: buffer; absorb; delay; smooth; capacity. Expected recall cues: buffer; absorb; delay; smooth; capacity. Season BUFFERING for Proof 038 activation field pond.

lineage_payloads.lesson_text: ACTION: SEASON. Mechanism label: SUPPORTED_ROTATION. Mechanism summary: Turning depends on a support interface whose friction or alignment state governs smooth motion. Observations: a circular part grows rough. Domain anchor: pivot. support contact warms. Domain anchor: pivot. drag rises. Domain anchor: pivot. motion locks or seizes. Domain anchor: pivot. Causal chain: body turns -> support carries rotation -> contact friction rises -> wobble or heat appears -> rotation stops. Consequence signature: turning; socket; drag; wobble; warm. Expected recall cues: turning; socket; drag; wobble; warm. Season SUPPORTED_ROTATION for Proof 038 activation field pond.
